CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS server_info (uuid UUID, server_name String);
SELECT uuid, server_name FROM server_info WHERE uuid = serverUUID();
WITH (SELECT serverUUID() AS unique_id) AS temp SELECT unique_id, server_name FROM server_info;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM server_info WHERE uuid = serverUUID();
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS logs (log_id UInt32, log_detail String, log_uuid UUID);
INSERT INTO logs (log_id, log_detail, log_uuid) VALUES (1, 'Server started', serverUUID());
SELECT log_detail FROM logs WHERE log_uuid = serverUUID() ORDER BY log_id DESC LIMIT 5;
CREATE VIEW IF NOT EXISTS server_logs AS SELECT log_detail, server_name FROM logs JOIN server_info ON logs.log_uuid = server_info.uuid;
SELECT * FROM server_logs WHERE server_name = 'main_server' AND log_detail LIKE '%started%';
SELECT serverUUID(), COUNT(DISTINCT server_name) FROM server_info GROUP BY serverUUID();
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS metrics (metric_id UInt32, server_uuid UUID DEFAULT serverUUID(), metric_value Float64);
SELECT AVG(metric_value) FROM metrics WHERE server_uuid = serverUUID();
SELECT DISTINCT server_uuid FROM metrics WHERE metric_value > 50;
